title: Restaurants & QSR
shortDescription: Fast processing. Zero setup fees. Instant approval.
fullDescription: Whether you're a fine dining establishment, quick-service restaurant, or food truck, we have payment solutions that keep transactions fast and secure.
painPoints: Need fast payment processing during peak hours
Multiple payment methods required (cards, digital wallets)

testimonial.text: We switched to National e-Payment and cut payment processing time in half. Our customers are happier, and so are we.
testimonial.author: Sarah Chen

title: Retail & E-commerce
fullDescription: From brick-and-mortar to online stores, our payment solutions support all your retail channels seamlessly.

title: Grocery & Convenience
shortDescription: High transaction volume. Competitive rates. 24/7 support.
fullDescription: Handle high-volume transactions with confidence. We support grocery stores and convenience stores of all sizes.

title: Gas Stations & Convenience Stores
shortDescription: Speed and loyalty programs built for fuel retailers.
fullDescription: Gas stations and convenience stores operate around the clock, and so do we. We deliver pay-at-pump solutions, fleet card acceptance, and integrated loyalty programs designed for the fuel retail industry.
painPoints: High-speed transaction requirements at the pump
Fleet card and commercial card management
solutions: Fleet card and commercial card acceptance
Integrated loyalty and gift card programs

title: Lodging & Hospitality
fullDescription: Hotels, motels, and hospitality businesses need reliable payment solutions. We deliver enterprise-grade processing with guest folio integration and secure tokenization.
painPoints: Need for room charges and deposits

title: E-commerce & Online Retail
shortDescription: Real-time online processing. Fraud protection. 95% approval rate.
fullDescription: Accept payments on your website with real-time authorization and advanced fraud detection. Our internet merchant accounts are optimized for online retail, subscriptions, and digital goods.
solutions: Advanced fraud detection and chargeback management
Support for major credit cards, digital wallets, and ACH
